name: Zach's Tech Turf
oneLine: Budget-PC-building YouTuber focused on gaming-PC flips and value hardware analysis.
bio: Zach's Tech Turf is a US-based YouTube channel started on April 26, 2015 covering gaming PC builds, hardware buying guides, and PC flipping for profit. The channel has grown to roughly 1.8 million subscribers with about 2.8 billion views and uploads weekly, typically on Wednesdays. Zach also streams on Twitch as ZachsTechTurf.
style: wide-shot bench builds with on-camera price-tracking and used-market commentary
